about.metaDescription: Discover Queue Park: where wait times come from, how favorites work, trend arrows, popular parks and all the features.
about.heroSubtitle: Your favorite parks' wait times, live and free for everyone.

intro.title: What is Queue Park?
intro.body: Queue Park brings together, in one place, the live wait times of over 100 theme parks around the world. Our goal: help you spot at a glance which attractions to ride right now and plan your day better, without keeping your nose buried in a map.

data.title: Where does the data come from?
data.body: Wait times come straight from the parks' official systems. We fetch, clean and standardize them so that Walibi, Disney, Europa-Park or Six Flags all look the same, with the same colors and the same level of detail.

worker.title: Behind the scenes
worker.body: An automated service runs continuously and polls the parks almost in real time. It checks each value, links every queue to the right attraction, records the day's history and also fetches opening hours and shows. If a data source behaves abnormally, the team is alerted automatically.

free.title: Free, no ads
free.body: Queue Park is completely free and ad-free. Checking wait times needs no account. To pin favorites and get alerts, a free, passwordless account (Google or magic link) is all it takes — and everything stays synced across your devices.

independent.title: An independent project
independent.body: Queue Park v2 is built by two theme-park enthusiasts, Lilian and Gaspard. It is neither an official app nor a service affiliated with any park. A comment, an idea, a park to add? Write to us at contact@queue-park.com.

report.title: Something looks off?
report.body: The data depends on the parks and can sometimes be incomplete or delayed. On every park page, the "Spotted a problem? Report it" button lets you flag an anomaly: it's the fastest way to help us improve reliability.

live.title: Live wait times
live.body: Every attraction shows its current wait time, refreshed automatically about once a minute — no need to reload the page, Queue Park does it for you every 60 seconds. The color sets the tone instantly: green for quick, orange for medium, red for long.

trend.title: Trends
trend.body: Next to a wait time, a small arrow shows the queue's recent direction: it points up (red) when the wait is growing, down (green) when it's shrinking, and stays flat (grey) when it's stable. Handy to decide whether to go now… or wait a bit.

queues.title: Queue types
queues.body: A single attraction may offer several queues: the classic line (Standby), plus options like Fastlane (skip-the-line), Single Rider (lone seat) or Virtual Queue. Tap an attraction that offers several to unfold all of its times.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.body: Tap the star to add a park, ride or show to your favorites. Favorite parks are pinned to the top of the home page; your favorite rides and shows are grouped by park in a window from your profile. Saved to your account and synced across all your devices.
favorites.hint: Tap a star: the favorite park jumps to the top of the home page.

popular.title: Popular parks
popular.body: The "Popular parks" section highlights the parks most viewed on Queue Park over the last few hours. It's a good reflection of where attention — and crowds — are gathering right now.

search.title: Search & random park
search.body: Find any park by typing its name, its group (Disney, Walibi…) or its country. Feeling adventurous? The dice button takes you to a randomly picked park. You can also filter the list by country or group, and hide closed parks.

shows.title: Shows
shows.body: For the relevant parks, a "Shows" tab displays the day's showtimes as a timeline. These schedules are updated every hour.

status.title: Statuses at a glance
status.body: Each park shows whether it's open or closed, and every attraction displays its state: open, closed, down or under maintenance. Colored dots let you grasp the situation without reading a single line.

preferences.title: Your way
preferences.body: Queue Park adapts to you: light, dark or automatic theme (following your system), 12-hour or 24-hour time format, and an interface available in 14 languages. Your choices are remembered for your next visits.

alerts.title: Wait-time alerts
alerts.body: From a ride's page, pick a threshold: you get a notification as soon as the wait drops below it. Once sent, the alert turns off (goal reached) and can be re-enabled in one tap from your profile. Requires an account and notification permission.

reminders.title: Show reminders
reminders.body: From a show's page, tap an upcoming performance then choose how long before it you want a heads-up. You get the notification right before it starts. Requires an account and notification permission.

detail.title: Detail view
detail.body: The eye at the end of each row opens a detail view: image, favourite, alerts, and a chart of the day's wait time with its forecast.

account.title: Your account
account.body: Sign in without a password (Google or magic link). Your favourites, alerts and preferences follow you across all your devices.

metadata.title: Queue Park - Live Theme Park Wait Times
metadata.description: Real-time wait times for over 100 theme parks worldwide. Track attraction queues, plan your visit, and maximize your fun with live data directly from park APIs.
metadata.keywords: theme park wait times, amusement park queues, roller coaster wait times, theme park app, live wait times, attraction queues, Disney wait times, Universal wait times, Six Flags wait times, theme park planning
metadata.ogTitle: Queue Park - Live Theme Park Wait Times
metadata.ogDescription: Real-time wait times for over 100 theme parks worldwide. Track attraction queues and plan your visit with live data.
metadata.twitterTitle: Queue Park - Live Theme Park Wait Times
metadata.twitterDescription: Real-time wait times for over 100 theme parks worldwide. Track attraction queues and plan your visit.

profile.title: Profile
profile.heroSubtitle: Your preferences, your wait-time alerts and their history.
profile.alertsDailyNote: Alerts only apply to the current day: they turn off automatically the next day and are deleted after a week.
profile.alertsEmpty: No alerts yet. Create one from an attraction.
profile.historyRetentionNote: Alerts older than 30 days aren't shown.
profile.alertsEmptyRides: No alert set up. Create one from a ride.
profile.alertsEmptyShows: No reminder set up. Create one from a show.
profile.activeEmptyAll: No active alert or reminder for today.
profile.leadTooLate: The show is too soon to change the lead time.

privacy.emailNote: After changing it, you'll be signed out and will need to sign back in with the new address.
privacy.emailTaken: This email address is already in use.
privacy.deleteNote: This is permanent: preferences, favorites, alerts and reminders will be erased.
privacy.deleteConfirmDescription: Type your email address ({email}) to confirm. This cannot be undone.
privacy.exportNote: Download a copy of your account: email, preferences, favourites, alerts and show reminders.

alerts.createDescription: Get notified when the wait for {ride} drops below a threshold.
alerts.thresholdLabel: Notify me when the wait drops below
alerts.thresholdHint: You'll be alerted as soon as the wait time falls below this threshold.

attractionDetail.chartUnavailablePermanent: This attraction rarely or never shows a wait time.
attractionDetail.alertsUnavailable: No alert available: this attraction rarely or never shows a wait time.
attractionDetail.chartForecastNote: Rough estimate for the rest of the day.
attractionDetail.chartForecastPreOpeningNote: Estimate based on past days — will update once the park opens.
attractionDetail.installIntro: Alerts require the app installed on your device.
attractionDetail.installAndroidSteps: Open your browser's ⋮ menu, then "Add to Home screen".
attractionDetail.installIosSteps: Tap Share, then "Add to Home Screen".
attractionDetail.installDesktopSteps: Use the install icon in your browser's address bar.
attractionDetail.installAccountNote: An account will also be required to create alerts.
attractionDetail.signInIntro: Sign in to be notified when the wait drops.
attractionDetail.pushBlocked: Alert saved, but this device won't receive anything (notifications aren't allowed).
attractionDetail.pushDenied: Notifications are blocked for this site. Allow them in your browser settings to receive alerts on this device.
attractionDetail.pushUnsupported: This browser doesn't support push notifications. The alert will still appear in your profile and history.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Queue Park processes your personal data. Data controller: the site publisher (see <mentions>Legal notice</mentions>), contact: <mail>contact@queue-park.com</mail>.
privacy.dataTitle: Data processed, purposes and legal bases
privacy.data1: Account (email address, and where applicable name and profile picture via Google): creating and managing your account — performance of the service / your consent.
privacy.data2: Preferences (language, theme, time format) and favourites (parks, attractions, shows): personalising your experience — performance of the service.
privacy.data3: Wait-time alerts and show reminders, together with the notification subscriptions of your devices: sending you the notifications you requested — your consent.
privacy.data4: Audience measurement (Google Analytics): traffic statistics — your consent (see the Cookie Policy).
privacy.recipients1: Your data is not sold. It is processed by providers acting on our behalf: Google (authentication and audience measurement), Resend (sending sign-in emails), IONOS (hosting, European Union).
privacy.recipients2: Some providers (Google, Resend) are established in the United States; any transfers are governed by the mechanisms provided for by the GDPR (Data Privacy Framework and/or standard contractual clauses).
privacy.retention1: Account data: until the account is deleted.
privacy.retention2: Alerts: valid for the current day; history kept for 30 days.
privacy.retention3: Show reminders: deleted once the performance has passed.
privacy.retention4: Sign-in sessions: for the validity period of the session.
privacy.rights1: You have the right of access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection and restriction. From your <profile>profile</profile> (Preferences → Privacy tab) you can directly change your email, download your data (JSON) and delete your account. For any other request, write to <mail>contact@queue-park.com</mail>.
privacy.rights2: You may also lodge a complaint with your data protection authority (in France, the CNIL — cnil.fr).
privacy.security1: Communications are encrypted (HTTPS) and authentication is passwordless. We limit the data collected to what is strictly necessary. The service is not intended for minors under 15 without the consent of a holder of parental authority.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: A cookie is a small file placed on your device when you visit a site. Queue Park uses a minimal set of them, described below.
cookies.necessaryIntro: Essential to the operation of the site, they do not require your consent:
cookies.necessary1: Authentication session: keeps you signed in to your account.
cookies.audience1: We use Google Analytics to understand site traffic and improve it. These cookies (e.g. _ga, _ga_*) are only set after your consent and are kept for up to 13 months.
cookies.manage1: You can accept or refuse these cookies via the banner shown on your first visit, and change your choice at any time using the “Manage cookies” link at the bottom of the page. You can also configure your browser to block cookies.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.editor1: The Queue Park website (queue-park.com) is published by Lilian G. and Gaspard D.
legalNotice.hosting1: The site is hosted by IONOS SARL, 7, place de la Gare, BP 70109, 57201 SARREGUEMINES Cedex, France (ionos.fr).
legalNotice.ip1: The structure, texts and graphic elements of the site are the property of their publisher, unless otherwise stated. Any unauthorised reproduction is prohibited. Park, attraction and show names belong to their respective owners.
legalNotice.liability1: Wait times and show schedules are provided for information only, from third-party sources, without any guarantee of accuracy or availability. The publisher cannot be held liable for any harm arising from their use.
